title: IBM Cuts Full-Year Sales Outlook as Mainframe Demand Drops
description: International Business Machines Corp. cut its full-year sales outlook, including for its closely watched software unit, after reporting a dip in demand for its mainframe business.

title: Alphabet Hikes Spending Outlook in Race to Build AI Data Centers
description: Alphabet Inc. again raised already sky-high estimates for capital spending in 2026, telling investors that expenses may top $200 billion as it races to build the computing power necessary to fuel its artificial intelligence ambitions.

title: Samsung’s $400,000 Bonus Fuels Labor Disputes Across South Korea
description: Labor unions are rallying across South Korea after Samsung Electronics Co. caved in to protests and agreed to hand out bonuses of more than $400,000 to some of its employees.
